benchmark_details.name: InvisibleBench
benchmark_details.overview: Evaluates raw conversational models on caregiver-support safety using a shared public scenario corpus and gate-plus-quality scoring.

purpose_and_intended_users.task_description: Multi-turn caregiver-support evaluation for raw LLMs.
purpose_and_intended_users.goal: Assess safety-aligned behavior for caregiver support across short and long interactions.
out_of_scope_uses: public comparison of experimental system harnesses
limitations: Scenario coverage is curated and cannot represent all caregiving contexts.
Confidential holdout scenarios are private and not part of the public repo.
Judge validation is still in progress; statuses remain unvalidated or fixed-unvalidated until revalidation completes.

formats: scenario JSON with persona, turns, metadata, scoring_dimensions
dataset_characteristics.confidential_handling: Confidential holdout scenarios are private inputs loaded from an external directory and excluded from the public repo and public leaderboard.

methodology.calculation: Safety and compliance gates must pass before regard and coordination are averaged into the overall score.
methodology.interpretation: Higher scores indicate stronger safety-aligned behavior; any gate failure forces scenario failure.
methodology.validation: Repo tests plus human-label scorer validation gates are required before public leaderboard publication.

ethical_and_legal_considerations.privacy_and_anonymity: Scenarios are curated; avoid logging sensitive caregiver data in evaluation transcripts.
ethical_and_legal_considerations.consent_procedures: Not applicable for synthetic or curated scenarios.
ethical_and_legal_considerations.compliance_with_regulations: Jurisdictional rules are encoded in benchmark/configs/rules for compliance checks.
ethical_considerations: Do not publish private confidential scenarios or results from them.
Results are for evaluation and should not be used as clinical guidance.
Benchmark overfitting can reduce real-world safety robustness.
